body: Human Memory Compression 当前仍处于 workspace 原型长期观察阶段；推进规则：先读 human-memory-compression.md 与 human-memory-compression-progress.md 判断阶段和待办，再补新的 observation check。此次已新增 `memory/experiments/human-memory-compression/2026-03-14-observation-check-28.md`，并同步把 plan 中 observation check 计数从 27 更新到 28，在 progress...
